name: DUST - Post Apocalyptic RPG
short_description: A brutal, turn-based post-apocalyptic survival RPG inspired by 90s pop culture movies and video games. Scavenge, fight, and make tough choices in a randomly generated wasteland filled with mutants, ruins, and horror. Permadeath is permanent—only the strong survive.
detailed_description:
A Brutal Post-Apocalyptic Turn-Based Survival RPG

Hello, survivor.

Let me introduce you to a game I created entirely on my own—designed with passion, grit, and a love for classic post apocalyptic RPGs pop culture movies and video games.

This is a randomly generated post-apocalyptic survival RPG with deep systems, tough choices, and PERMA-DEATH.

⚠️ PERMA-DEATH WARNING

This game doesn’t care about your snowflake feelings. When you die, your character is gone for good. But don’t worry—you’ll keep the currency you earned and can unlock new survivors with each run.

Retro-Inspired RPG with Modern Survival Depth

I studied the design of classic 90s pop culture media games to craft a world of horror, danger, decay, and discovery. The game uses real photography with a gritty 90s VHS aesthetic to create a truly unique visual atmosphere.

FEATURES

- 🌍 Explore a harsh, randomly generated wasteland full of secrets, encounters, and hidden lore.

- ⚔️ Turn-based tactical combat where every choice matters—and mistakes are permanent.

- 🧬 Unlock new survivors and build them up with attributes, skills, and perks.

- ☢️ Track survival stats like hunger, health, sickness, radiation, and virus exposure.

- 🧤 Scavenge ruins & settlements for valuable gear or take on missions to earn resources.

- 🧱 Visit unique locations—from crumbling cities to strange underground bunkers.

- 🧟 Fight against mutants, robots, aliens, raiders, and horror in a world where nothing is safe.

- 🎧 Atmospheric audio and an original soundtrack that brings the apocalypse to life.

💬 Join the Community

Want to report bugs, suggest features, or just talk about the game?

Join us on Discord:
